Why us

Honest work,
fair pricing.

"No call-out fees that don't go toward the job. No upselling work you don't need."

Volt & Co. has been serving the Southern Suburbs since 2018. We're a small, licensed team that believes in doing the job right the first time — and explaining exactly what we're doing and why. Our team trains regularly on safety standards and the latest electrical codes.
